allow: Bash(node -e "const ai = require\('ai'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(ai\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('message'\) || k === 'useChat'\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const ai = require\('ai'\); const keys = Object.keys\(ai\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => !k.startsWith\('_'\)\).sort\(\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { $pid = $proc.OwningProcess; $pname = \(Get-Process -Id $pid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Name; Write-Host "PID: $pid, Name: $pname"; Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed." } else { Write-Host "Nothing on port 3000." })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { $ownerPid = $conn.OwningProcess; $pname = \(Get-Process -Id $ownerPid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Name; Write-Host "PID: $ownerPid, Name: $pname"; Stop-Process -Id $ownerPid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed." } else { Write-Host "Nothing on port 3000." })
